list.name: Changes
list.comment:
CI: Optimize WasmJS build configuration for web deployment.
This commit tunes the GitHub Actions workflow for the web distribution build to improve stability and resource management.
- Added the `--no-daemon` flag to the `wasmJsBrowserDistribution` Gradle task to prevent persistent processes in the CI environment. - Configured `GRADLE_OPTS` to set Kotlin daemon JVM memory limits (`-Xmx5g -Xms1g`) to prevent out-of-memory errors during compilation.

list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Refactor: Improve shape drawing and update dependencies.
This commit introduces several key changes:
- **Refactored `SquircleShapePath`:** - Removed the corner radius scaling that was dependent on the smoothing value. - Replaced straight `lineTo` calls with `cubicTo` for the shape's edges, allowing for a subtle pinch effect and a more organic appearance.
- **Updated Dependencies:** - Bumped Kotlin to `2.3.0` and Compose to `1.11.0`. - Migrated project dependencies to use the version catalog (`libs.versions.toml`). - Updated the library version to `5.0.0` and changed the `groupId`.
- **Sample App Improvements:** - Refactored the preview screen to use a `ViewModel` for state management. - Introduced Koin for dependency injection. - Improved layout responsiveness for larger screens.
- **Documentation:** - Updated `README.md` with breaking changes for version `5.0.0`, new minimum requirements, and updated dependency instructions.

project.component: { "keyToString": { "ASKED_ADD_EXTERNAL_FILES": "true", "ASKED_SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "Android App.androidApp.executor": "Run", "Android App.app.executor": "Run", "Android App.application.androidApp.executor": "Run", "Android App.application.executor": "Run", "Android App.composeApp.executor": "Run", "ApkExportedModule": "SquircleShape.androidApp", "ExportApk.ApkPathForSquircleShape.androidApp": "/Users/stoyan/StudioProjects/squircle-shape/androidApp", "ExportApk.ApkPathForSquircleShape.composeApp": "/Users/stoyan/AndroidStudioProjects/squircle-shape/composeApp", "Gradle.Building Kotlin artifacts for Build :composeApp:embedAndSignAppleFrameworkForXcode.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Configure Daemon JVM Criteria.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Download Sources.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Upgrade Gradle wrapper.executor": "Run", "Gradle.composeApp [desktop].executor": "Run", "Gradle.composeApp [wasmJs].executor": "Run", "Gradle.main [jvm].executor": "Run", "Gradle.squircle-shape [application:run].executor": "Run", "Gradle.squircle-shape [application:wasmJsRun].executor": "Run", "Gradle.squircle-shape [composeApp:run].executor": "Run", "Gradle.squircle-shape [composeApp:wasmJsBrowserProductionRun].executor": "Run", "Gradle.squircle-shape [composeApp:wasmJsRun].executor": "Run", "Gradle.squircle-shape [testClasses].executor": "Run", "GradleDaemonJvmCriteriaMigrationNotification.isNotificationDisabled": "true", "Kotlin.MainKt.executor": "Run", "Kotlin.MainKtKt.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.OpenProjectViewOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "Xcode Application.iosApp.executor": "Run", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "dart.analysis.tool.window.visible": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "demo-app", "git-widget-placeholder": "release-5.1.1", "iOS Application.iosApp.executor": "Run", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/Users/stoyan/StudioProjects/squircle-shape/composeApp/build/dist/wasmJs/productionExecutable", "recommended.upgrade.do.not.ask.for.project": "true", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "com.android.studio.ml.bot.mainConfigurable", "show.migrate.to.gradle.popup": "false" }, "keyToStringList": { "ExportApk.BuildVariants": [ "release" ] } }

task.summary: Increased default corner smoothing. - The default corner smoothing value is increased from 0.67f to 0.72f - Added MIT License references.
Implemented lib version catalog. - Added libs.versions.toml - Modified README.md - Other minor improvements
Added collection of commonly used corner smoothing values. - Added CornerSmoothing.kt - Modified README.md - Other minor improvements.

Kotlin & Compose version bump - Bumped Kotlin version to 1.9.0. - Bumped Jetpack Compose version to 1.5.0. - Bumped Jetpack Compose compiler version to 1.5.1. - Bumped compileSdk to 34. - Bumped sourceCompatibility & targetCompatibility Java version to 17. - Replaced kotlinOptions.jvmTarget = "1.8" with kotlin { jvmToolchain(17) }.

Dependency & library version bump - Bumped Kotlin version to 1.9.10 - Bumped Compose version to 1.5.1 - Bumped Compose Compiler version to 1.5.1 - Bumped other dependencies version - Bumped library version - Updated README.md

Dependency & library version bump - Bumped Kotlin version to 1.9.22 - Bumped Compose version to 1.6.1 - Bumped Compose Compiler version to 1.5.9 - Bumped other dependencies version - Bumped library version to v1.0.7

Updated README, Dependency & library version bump.
- Bumped Kotlin version to 1.9.23 - Bumped Compose version to 1.6.6 - Bumped Compose Compiler version to 1.5.12 - Bumped other dependencies version - Bumped library version to v1.0.8

Added support for iOS targets.
- Added support for iOS targets. - Bumped Kotlin version to 2.0.21. - Bumped Compose version to 1.7.1. - Bumped other dependency versions. - Bumped library version to v2.1.0. - Other fixes & improvements.

Release v4.0.0
- Added GentleSquircleShape.kt - Added GentleSquircleBasedShape.kt - Added GentleSquircleShapePath.kt - Fixed corner smoothing to radius scaling. - Fixed RTL/LTR mirroring.

Refactor: Improve shape drawing and update dependencies.
This commit introduces several key changes:
- **Refactored `SquircleShapePath`:** - Removed the corner radius scaling that was dependent on the smoothing value. - Replaced straight `lineTo` calls with `cubicTo` for the shape's edges, allowing for a subtle pinch effect and a more organic appearance.
- **Updated Dependencies:** - Bumped Kotlin to `2.3.0` and Compose to `1.11.0`. - Migrated project dependencies to use the version catalog (`libs.versions.toml`). - Updated the library version to `5.0.0` and changed the `groupId`.
- **Sample App Improvements:** - Refactored the preview screen to use a `ViewModel` for state management. - Introduced Koin for dependency injection. - Improved layout responsiveness for larger screens.
- **Documentation:** - Updated `README.md` with breaking changes for version `5.0.0`, new minimum requirements, and updated dependency instructions.

Refactor: Update project structure and upgrade dependencies to version 5.1.0.
This commit introduces a major restructuring of the project to align with AGP 9.0.0 and Kotlin Multiplatform standards:
- **Project Restructuring:** - Created a standalone `androidApp` module for the demo application, moving Android-specific resources and the `MainActivity` from `composeApp`. - Converted the `library` and `composeApp` modules to use the `androidMultiplatformLibrary` plugin. - Simplified `iosApp` build configuration by removing unused test and profile schemes.
- **Dependency Updates:** - Updated Library version to `5.1.0`. - Upgraded **AGP** to `9.0.0` and **Gradle** to `9.1.0`. - Updated **Compose Multiplatform** to `1.11.0-alpha02` and **Jetpack Compose** to `1.11.0-alpha04`. - Added `androidx.compose.material3` and upgraded various core dependencies in the version catalog.
- **Feature Enhancements:** - **Dynamic Color Support:** Updated `MainActivity` to support Material 3 dynamic color schemes on Android S+. - **App Theming:** Refactored the `App` entry point to accept a `colorScheme`, allowing better state management between platform-specific launchers and the common UI.
- **Documentation & Legal:** - Updated `README.md` with new minimum requirements and AGP 9 migration warnings. - Updated `LICENSE` copyright year to 2026.

Refactor: Overhaul Demo App UI with a new navigation system and enhanced TopBar architecture.
This commit introduces a significant update to the demo app's presentation layer, replacing the previous collapsible top bar logic with a more flexible navigation system and integrating the Haze library for visual effects.
- **New Navigation Components:** - Implemented `BottomBar` and `SideRail` components with corresponding `Item` and `Action` sub-components for responsive navigation. - Added `BottomBarUtils` and `SideRailUtils` to manage layout, glassmorphism-style blur effects (via Haze), and interaction animations. - Integrated new vector resources: `home`, `documentation`, `settings`, and `arrow-back`.
- **TopBar Architecture Overhaul:** - Replaced `CollapsibleTopBar` and `ExitUntilCollapsedScrollBehavior` with a new `TopBar` component driven by `topBarStickyHeader`. - Moved collapse logic into `TopBarStickyHeader.kt`, using a sticky header in `LazyColumn`/`LazyGrid` to drive the shared `TopBarState`. - Introduced `LocalTopBarState` for easier state access across the UI hierarchy. - Updated `TopBarUtils` with refined container height calculations and safe drawing inset support.
- **Scaffold & UI Core:** - Updated `ScaffoldLayout` to support the new `BottomBar` and `SideRail`, including responsive logic to switch between them based on window size. - Integrated `HazeState` globally via `LocalHazeState` for unified blur effects across bars and actions. - Added `VerticalSpacer` and `HorizontalSpacer` utility components. - Refined `Typography` tokens for better scaling and `ColorScheme` outlines for better visibility. - Adjusted `RangedShape` radius scaling from `40f` to `56f`.
- **Dependencies & Documentation:** - Reverted Kotlin to `2.3.0` and AGP to `9.0.0` for the stable branch. - Downgraded Compose Multiplatform to `1.10.1` and Jetpack Compose to `1.10.3`. - Added `dev.chrisbanes.haze:haze` dependency. - Updated `README.md` to reflect the new release channels (`stable` vs `experimental`), updated minimum requirements, and bumped version to `5.1.1`.

CI: Implement GitHub Actions workflow for Wasm/Compose Web deployment.
This commit introduces an automated CI/CD pipeline to build and deploy the Compose Multiplatform Web (Wasm) target to GitHub Pages.
- **Automated Deployment Workflow:** - Added `.github/workflows/deploy-web.yml` to handle the build and deployment process. - Configured the workflow to trigger on pushes to the `demo-app` branch and via manual `workflow_dispatch`. - Set up a build environment using Ubuntu, JDK 21 (Temurin), and Gradle. - Implemented steps to build the WasmJS production distribution using the `:composeApp:wasmJsBrowserDistribution` task. - Integrated GitHub Pages artifact uploading and deployment actions. - **Permissions & Concurrency:** - Defined necessary permissions for writing content and managing Page deployments. - Configured concurrency settings to manage sequential deployments to the "pages" group.

CI: Optimize WasmJS build configuration for web deployment.
This commit tunes the GitHub Actions workflow for the web distribution build to improve stability and resource management.
- Added the `--no-daemon` flag to the `wasmJsBrowserDistribution` Gradle task to prevent persistent processes in the CI environment. - Configured `GRADLE_OPTS` to set Kotlin daemon JVM memory limits (`-Xmx5g -Xms1g`) to prevent out-of-memory errors during compilation.

MESSAGE.value: Increased default corner smoothing. - The default corner smoothing value is increased from 0.67f to 0.72f - Added MIT License references.
Implemented lib version catalog. - Added libs.versions.toml - Modified README.md - Other minor improvements
Added collection of commonly used corner smoothing values. - Added CornerSmoothing.kt - Modified README.md - Other minor improvements.

Kotlin & Compose version bump - Bumped Kotlin version to 1.9.0. - Bumped Jetpack Compose version to 1.5.0. - Bumped Jetpack Compose compiler version to 1.5.1. - Bumped compileSdk to 34. - Bumped sourceCompatibility & targetCompatibility Java version to 17. - Replaced kotlinOptions.jvmTarget = "1.8" with kotlin { jvmToolchain(17) }.

Dependency & library version bump - Bumped Kotlin version to 1.9.10 - Bumped Compose version to 1.5.1 - Bumped Compose Compiler version to 1.5.1 - Bumped other dependencies version - Bumped library version - Updated README.md

Dependency & library version bump - Bumped Kotlin version to 1.9.22 - Bumped Compose version to 1.6.1 - Bumped Compose Compiler version to 1.5.9 - Bumped other dependencies version - Bumped library version to v1.0.7

Updated README, Dependency & library version bump.
- Bumped Kotlin version to 1.9.23 - Bumped Compose version to 1.6.6 - Bumped Compose Compiler version to 1.5.12 - Bumped other dependencies version - Bumped library version to v1.0.8

Added support for iOS targets.
- Added support for iOS targets. - Bumped Kotlin version to 2.0.21. - Bumped Compose version to 1.7.1. - Bumped other dependency versions. - Bumped library version to v2.1.0. - Other fixes & improvements.

Release v4.0.0
- Added GentleSquircleShape.kt - Added GentleSquircleBasedShape.kt - Added GentleSquircleShapePath.kt - Fixed corner smoothing to radius scaling. - Fixed RTL/LTR mirroring.

Refactor: Improve shape drawing and update dependencies.
This commit introduces several key changes:
- **Refactored `SquircleShapePath`:** - Removed the corner radius scaling that was dependent on the smoothing value. - Replaced straight `lineTo` calls with `cubicTo` for the shape's edges, allowing for a subtle pinch effect and a more organic appearance.
- **Updated Dependencies:** - Bumped Kotlin to `2.3.0` and Compose to `1.11.0`. - Migrated project dependencies to use the version catalog (`libs.versions.toml`). - Updated the library version to `5.0.0` and changed the `groupId`.
- **Sample App Improvements:** - Refactored the preview screen to use a `ViewModel` for state management. - Introduced Koin for dependency injection. - Improved layout responsiveness for larger screens.
- **Documentation:** - Updated `README.md` with breaking changes for version `5.0.0`, new minimum requirements, and updated dependency instructions.

Refactor: Update project structure and upgrade dependencies to version 5.1.0.
This commit introduces a major restructuring of the project to align with AGP 9.0.0 and Kotlin Multiplatform standards:
- **Project Restructuring:** - Created a standalone `androidApp` module for the demo application, moving Android-specific resources and the `MainActivity` from `composeApp`. - Converted the `library` and `composeApp` modules to use the `androidMultiplatformLibrary` plugin. - Simplified `iosApp` build configuration by removing unused test and profile schemes.
- **Dependency Updates:** - Updated Library version to `5.1.0`. - Upgraded **AGP** to `9.0.0` and **Gradle** to `9.1.0`. - Updated **Compose Multiplatform** to `1.11.0-alpha02` and **Jetpack Compose** to `1.11.0-alpha04`. - Added `androidx.compose.material3` and upgraded various core dependencies in the version catalog.
- **Feature Enhancements:** - **Dynamic Color Support:** Updated `MainActivity` to support Material 3 dynamic color schemes on Android S+. - **App Theming:** Refactored the `App` entry point to accept a `colorScheme`, allowing better state management between platform-specific launchers and the common UI.
- **Documentation & Legal:** - Updated `README.md` with new minimum requirements and AGP 9 migration warnings. - Updated `LICENSE` copyright year to 2026.

Refactor: Overhaul Demo App UI with a new navigation system and enhanced TopBar architecture.
This commit introduces a significant update to the demo app's presentation layer, replacing the previous collapsible top bar logic with a more flexible navigation system and integrating the Haze library for visual effects.
- **New Navigation Components:** - Implemented `BottomBar` and `SideRail` components with corresponding `Item` and `Action` sub-components for responsive navigation. - Added `BottomBarUtils` and `SideRailUtils` to manage layout, glassmorphism-style blur effects (via Haze), and interaction animations. - Integrated new vector resources: `home`, `documentation`, `settings`, and `arrow-back`.
- **TopBar Architecture Overhaul:** - Replaced `CollapsibleTopBar` and `ExitUntilCollapsedScrollBehavior` with a new `TopBar` component driven by `topBarStickyHeader`. - Moved collapse logic into `TopBarStickyHeader.kt`, using a sticky header in `LazyColumn`/`LazyGrid` to drive the shared `TopBarState`. - Introduced `LocalTopBarState` for easier state access across the UI hierarchy. - Updated `TopBarUtils` with refined container height calculations and safe drawing inset support.
- **Scaffold & UI Core:** - Updated `ScaffoldLayout` to support the new `BottomBar` and `SideRail`, including responsive logic to switch between them based on window size. - Integrated `HazeState` globally via `LocalHazeState` for unified blur effects across bars and actions. - Added `VerticalSpacer` and `HorizontalSpacer` utility components. - Refined `Typography` tokens for better scaling and `ColorScheme` outlines for better visibility. - Adjusted `RangedShape` radius scaling from `40f` to `56f`.
- **Dependencies & Documentation:** - Reverted Kotlin to `2.3.0` and AGP to `9.0.0` for the stable branch. - Downgraded Compose Multiplatform to `1.10.1` and Jetpack Compose to `1.10.3`. - Added `dev.chrisbanes.haze:haze` dependency. - Updated `README.md` to reflect the new release channels (`stable` vs `experimental`), updated minimum requirements, and bumped version to `5.1.1`.

CI: Implement GitHub Actions workflow for Wasm/Compose Web deployment.
This commit introduces an automated CI/CD pipeline to build and deploy the Compose Multiplatform Web (Wasm) target to GitHub Pages.
- **Automated Deployment Workflow:** - Added `.github/workflows/deploy-web.yml` to handle the build and deployment process. - Configured the workflow to trigger on pushes to the `demo-app` branch and via manual `workflow_dispatch`. - Set up a build environment using Ubuntu, JDK 21 (Temurin), and Gradle. - Implemented steps to build the WasmJS production distribution using the `:composeApp:wasmJsBrowserDistribution` task. - Integrated GitHub Pages artifact uploading and deployment actions. - **Permissions & Concurrency:** - Defined necessary permissions for writing content and managing Page deployments. - Configured concurrency settings to manage sequential deployments to the "pages" group.

CI: Optimize WasmJS build configuration for web deployment.
This commit tunes the GitHub Actions workflow for the web distribution build to improve stability and resource management.
- Added the `--no-daemon` flag to the `wasmJsBrowserDistribution` Gradle task to prevent persistent processes in the CI environment. - Configured `GRADLE_OPTS` to set Kotlin daemon JVM memory limits (`-Xmx5g -Xms1g`) to prevent out-of-memory errors during compilation.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
CI: Optimize WasmJS build configuration for web deployment.
This commit tunes the GitHub Actions workflow for the web distribution build to improve stability and resource management.
- Added the `--no-daemon` flag to the `wasmJsBrowserDistribution` Gradle task to prevent persistent processes in the CI environment. - Configured `GRADLE_OPTS` to set Kotlin daemon JVM memory limits (`-Xmx5g -Xms1g`) to prevent out-of-memory errors during compilation.
